name: Sweet Potato Souffle
recipeInstructions:
This is an old family favorite recipe. It brings back fond memories for me since my mom used to fix it for our family every holiday season.
1. Scald the milk and add sugar, salt, butter, nutmeg, and mashed sweet potatoes. Beat until fluffy.
2. Beat egg yolks and add them to the potato mixture.
3. Add raisins and chopped pecans.
4. Beat egg whites stiff and fold into the potato mixture.
5. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish.
6. Bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees F) for 50 to 60 minutes or until firm.
7. Top with marshmallows and brown in the oven.
8. Serves 8.
Note: You might like to do a flower of peach slices in the center of your sweet potato souffle.
